name: cdp-proxy-js-compat-clients
description: Pinned JS CDP clients driven against the proxy by tests/unit/proxy/test_client_compat.py.
comment: Exact pins, no ranges: a CI gate that silently follows a client's latest release
is not reproducible. playwright-core matches the repo's pinned playwright.
Both packages are the -core builds and connect to an already-running browser, so
npm ci downloads no Chromium at all — the browser comes from the upstream adapter.
